text: I wish I could put zero star. It is the worst company. First of all their people gave me wrong information and told me I am going to receive $200 gift card for each line. After I move over my lines, they said you are not qualified  for this promotion. I called customer service and they told me they are going to to review the records calls and we will get back to me but they lied. Then they offer me home wifi for two weeks free and if I don't like it I can return it and no charge. They charged me for that too. Also, they told me the plan comes with 4 lines and data with no extra charge. They charge me for data usage and 2 lines. Don't trust them please. Working with T-mobile is like a nightmare.

I can't shout out enough for the outstanding customer service I received!!! It started online and when I took my phone in to get transferred I met Augustina she was as professional as she was beautiful!! Got me in and in less then 20 minutes I will definitely recommend the  store on 72nd in tacoma she rocked!!! I also want to thank all the reps  online chat and phone who helped me deal with my situation with UPS so thank u all for the excellent service.

I would give T-Mobile 0 stars if I could! I trialed the home internet service. It did not work out for me so I returned the device. So far so good, but then the nightmare started. I received a bill with a credit of about $40. It said it was the final bill so I assumed they would issue a refund, which is what almost everyone does. Nope! a few months went by and I got another "final" bill. I called T-Mobile and was told that since my account had been closed I needed to go to a T-Mobile store. I did that but the person I worked with said he couldn't understand why they'd sent me to a store as they aren't able to issue refunds. He then called T-Mobile, where, after 30 minutes, he was told that they would issue a credit card payment. All together I spent about 2 hours trying to get T-Mobile to do what they should have done automatically.

I was offered to trade in two IPhone X for IPhone 13 if I sign a new contract. I did and 6 months in I have to call every month for them to adjust the bill because they are charging me when they got the 2 excellent Iphone X as trades. They acknowledge every time that I qualified for the offer and every thing should be fine, and they created a ticket and it should be fixed, but I still have to call every month. Also, no US representative option available, since 100% of their business is outsourced. I will be leaving even if I have to break the contract. Run from these people.

In the beginning the salesman made a good pitch they promised so many freebies all kinds of stuff they promised I have had an issue getting into the portal to claim those free things since day one I've called them over and over again they sent me the modem box which only had two bars on it at all times and it was in the window in the living room, the service went down pretty quick and they don't want to help they beat around the bush I finally got into my account but it was too late to claim anything and now the phone is locked I can't use it with any other company not even a free company, there's another phone that I have from them that I don't know the pin number to get into so therefore I can't even turn the power off I feel like I'm being listened to and spied on they really disappointed I was trying to see if they were better than Xfinity which the man bad mouth the hell out of Xfinity. Never again to T-Mobile nor Xfinity. If there is anything misspelled I use voice typing and didn't go back and check. Ain't got time for that!the service sucked from day one and now I got a $570 bill. I told them that I was in the hospital for my heart attack and because I don't remember the pin number which I don't remember a lot of stuff right now they told me I need to come into the office I was sitting in the hospital really people just send me a return label like I said you can have your modem and your phones I don't know how I got two phones from you anyway! One of the worst Services I've ever used Ever!!!!!  I tried to make it right they wouldn't work with me so good luck with your 570

Pretty bad when employees tell you to look for a different carrier. 

We have been with Sprint/ T-Mobile for 22 years.  Once we were switched to T-Mobile our service was awful. We went to two different stores and complained numerous times. We live in on a farm and need to have service in case of an emergency. Sprint was never a problem.  Two towns about 10-15 miles from us only have spotty service with t- mobile. 

One day I went in to T-Mobile and complained. They promised that things would get better in the next several months. I told them I was still losing calls in the town where their store was located. One of the workers attempting to call me twice, while I was in the store, and both calls were dropped. 

Instead of getting better, our service was getting worse. 

Over the next couple of months (about 1 1/2 years with T-Mobile), I started going in ever time my phone acted up.  I even knew a few of the employees on a first name basis. 

After several times of replacing the Sim card and trouble shooting, I was told by three different employees on three different occasions over a couple month period, that I would be better off going with a different carrier! At least they were honest. I was told that many customers in my area were having the same issues and were changing carriers. 

After going in to the store or calling in, a couple of times I was texted a survey. 

I replied negatively, but was never contacted. 

When my husband canceled our service today,  they thanked him for being such an excellent customer for over 22 years and for having multiple lines.  They asked why he was dropping T-Mobile. He explained. Then he asked if they would waive the last bill since we have had so much trouble. A supervisor then spoke to my husband and told him, “No”. The supervisor explained that we had only complained a couple times in all those years about our service. My husband corrected him. Evidently the complaints were never recorded.  

We would still be with T-Mobile if we could get service.  We are even on flat land and only had one bar within a ten mile radius of our home.  

Come on T-Mobile, you can do better than that.

Chelsea a very RUDE and disrespectful lady glad all the phone call are recorded she has not knowledge of what she was talking about talking about some credit balance that I have on a previous account and couldn’t even gave us the right terminology which speaks pretty clear and low of herself BUT thankfully LEO helped us and had the right and correct terminology and was very nice to me by helping my understand and to get this resolve 

T MOBILE needs to have a talk to Chelsea that had not respect over the customer and don’t even let the customer finish talk so arrogant, if you can’t work on customer service get another job!!!

If i could give a half star i would. I just signed up for Tmobile on Monday and seemed to get a good deal with streaming service, discount on payment, trade in for my phones and ending my current provider early and making a switch. This was where everything has gone downhill. I was promised for a delivery by today if I paid $15 for express shipping. Sounded good and I was looking forward to it. They sent me no information once the call was over and when i called last night to talk to their service (lack there of) I was informed that I would not be able to setup an account or verify anything because nothing can be done until the phones arrive. Dont worry though, because they will credit the shipping and the phones arrive today. Great. Today comes and by end of day to my surprise there are no phones so I call service again. 60 minutes, 2 reps, a lot of hold time and an supervisor who refuses to get on the phone and me being told that they have business customers who are more important I wait. The first rep tells me a supervisor will be coming and this is the last time he will tell me that, and then he transfers me to another rep who asks me to go through everything again because she is not a supervisor. This rep tells me that my order was actually cancelled but dont worry they can reorder for delivery tomorrow. I ask about a supervisor and am told the supervisor is on a call and knows the situation because while she was on her call this rep told her everything (seems odd) and then in another sentence tells me that the supervisor is right next to her (obvious lies) but would be right to me. During this time I am also talking to a service (lack of) rep through twitter who informs me very casually that my order is 3-5 days an asks if that makes sense. He was most helpful though and informed me that the phone has a tracking number but never left and may not ship for another 2 days. While that is happening the rep on the phone comes back assuring me that the phones have shipped and are on their way. lol. Nobody knows anything but this is what you get with software and mobile companies. they look at a computer and say whatever works best for them at that time. This service is the absolute worst and I will probably be cancelling when phones arrive and sending back. What a crappy company. I am told the phone service as far as wifi and actual phone is really good. I just dont think you can trust this company. They dont care about the customer.

I decided to switch from AT&T to T-Mobile thinking I would get a lower bill and better service. Jokes on me. I purchased 2 phones from a local T-Mobile store with the magenta max plan also the WiFi service. I was given a handful of lies about the plan and sent out the door with 1 of the phones being the wrong phone I requested to purchase. I wanted 2 iPhone pros with 256GB and I only got 1, the other phone was 128GB. I’ve contacted customer service several times about this issue and have also confronted the store manager who in a nutshell called me a liar and said he couldn’t do anything about it. 
It also turns out I never signed a contract. The sales associate forged my signature on the documents. I filed a complaint with the fraud department and have yet to hear from them. At this point I just want to cancel the entire service and go back to AT&T. Customer service says they can cancel my service but I would be responsible for the full price of the phones. I told them they could have the phones back and they said I couldn’t return them because it’s past the 14 day return period. That’s not my fault I’ve been waiting days for the their fraud department to contact me with the forgery issue. I’ve been dealing with this for over a month and I’m done. I can’t talk to anyone past a customer service representative and I’m getting know where. I just wanted T-Mobile to do the right thing and exchange the phone to the correct one. 
I DO NOT recommend T-Mobile to anyone.

No idea why I'm required to mark a specific date of experience, as if I wasn't reviewing a company at large rather than something they did on a certain date, but such as trustpilot is. And it's changing that date to an earlier one after I submit my review. 
T-mobile is over-priced, over-rated, and under-whelming, poor quality service. T-mobile has shed its "un-carrier" claims, and returned to over-charging, hidden fees, and shady practices, moving as many as possible to their most expensive plans, and excluding the more basic offerings from all new promotions, and creating new fees to charge customers for services previously offered. On top of that, they refuse to upgrade their equipment so that customers get the quality of service they are promised. I've been a customer for years and I've never been able to use mobile data, as even though my phone displays the LTE icon, I've never had much better quality speeds than backwoods dsl providers offered a decade ago. I am enrolled on the "essentials" plan, the previous lowest priced offering (which is no longer offered), and I pay just shy of $200 per month for three lines. I ask you, what's so essential about that? I pay as much as the higher priced plans and get none of the so-called freebies like streaming services that are included in the higher priced plans, and I'm stuck with old devices unless I can afford to add new monthly fees to my account to pay for new devices, usually $30 or more per month, so even the promise of the "Jump" are out of reach. For claiming to be the industry's lowest priced carrier, they sure insist on demonstrating exactly the opposite.
Their idea of 5G is equal to the old dial-up

Recently I lost my phone, which is obviously my fault. I could not login to my tmobile account on my laptop to file a claim because they require you to verify your identity via phone. Obviously I couldn't do this without one so I went to a Tmobile store where they could not take the claim but let me use their landline to call the insurance. New phone and SIM came in two days later and doesn't work. It came in after 7 PM so stores were closed. I spent 45 minutes chatting with online support who ultimately said I had to go back to the store because I only have one line so I can't verify my account with them. This is an INSANE policy! Financial institutions and organizations all over the nation use several other options to verify identification when necessary. I asked to at least file a complaint on this matter and got no response. I am going to the store tomorrow to activate my sim and file a formal complaint. If they don't at least waive my monthly charge I'm going back to Verizon. This is terrible service.

Customer service reps do not have much information when it comes to your bill, cancelled my service to switch providers, was told I don’t owe anything, 1 month later received a bill for $360 and they have such a monopoly that they don’t care about accountability and will do nothing about it. Beware in this situation and do not allocate your money to something else till you are sure they are not sending a bill

Stay away from T-Mobile one of the worst carrier they ruined my credit for something I didn't do we pay them in full and we spent over 100 hours on the phone establishing that I have already paid the balance of $1500 and yet they kept sending it to the collection agencies and the collection agencies harassing us and put it on the credit report then we will send them the support and documents that we already paid this they remove it and then T-Mobile again will send it I've called T-Mobile hundreds of times spending hours with them on the phone and they know it is settled but they cannot remove the balance and they said we don't know how to do it it's out of our hand they made my life miserable for the last 2 years stay away from this carrier

I just signed up with them a wk ago they will rush you into signing up that they for get to fully explain how much data the home internet has mines is about to run out soon but no one took out the time to explain how much was available it’s working good to be in a rural area but watch all the nice talking they’ll overlook some things in the process

Horrible service! I contacted the customer service twice spoke to 2 female staff , one named Alex who is very sarcastic, unhelpful and rude.
I was hold off for more than 30 minutes but no help was given. MMS and international call was not working. They have no email to send complaints. Not happy. Go somewhere else.

'm sure I'm not the only person this has happened to, but want to share my situation so others are aware of the bait and switch they like to do. 
I signed up for a "free" Mi-Fi. I asked multiple times about the device being free and what not. Was told it was free (attached screenshots of chat.) I even had toI'm sure I'm no call in after the fact to get a credit, because I was being charged for the device. And again was told it was fixed. Now when I try to cancel my service, not only do I find that I only got a credit once for the device, but I ALSO have to pay $120 for the remaining balance of my device. I NEVER would have signed up for a 2 yr agreement. I had no intentions at the time of keeping the mobile internet service for that long. BIG OLE SCAM!!!
No wonder they don't send chat transcripts. They don't want to send you proof that they lie.

I called to cancel my service and tried to at least get a credit for the amount I was over charged and was told sorry, we can only go back 3 months since you haven't called in before about this. But I did and sent them the screenshots and got a credit. I assumed it was fixed at that time, but... It wasn't.

I was a loyal Sprint/Tmobile customer for over 15 years. I more than fulfilled my 2 yr contract and was due for a free upgrade/phone. So I talked to a rep to know my options. It all went south from there

-I found out they were charging me insurance without my consent (the rep lied to me, I never get insurance I buy a lifeproof case for insurance, it's cheaper long term)
-My phone was a lease, so I was paying to insure THEIR PHONE
-I had been paying lease fees for over 3 years and paid triple for my phone
-I called customer service and asked for a refund for the excess since I completed the 2 yr contract and yet paid triple
-The first night I spent 2 hrs tyring to understand their accent since their call center agent spoke broken English
-The second night I asked for a manager and spent 2 more hours being passed off 3 different times until they disconnected me - (I had to call back to a different department)
-THEY DON'T WANT TO LET YOU SPEAK TO A MANAGER - (I never spoke to one)
-They wouldn't refund my money. Since I triple paid they GRACIOUSLY let me keep it
-Since I was paying insurance I asked them to replace my phone because it was broken but was denied since I switched providers because of all this garbage (since I switched they said the 3 yrs of fraudulent insurance payments no longer applied)
-So all told I got to keep my BROKEN PHONE and they GRACIOUSLY waved the $100 fee they were going to charge for who knows what, and they followed it up with a $70 fee to finish out my plan...

Since I have switched providers, got a $100 iphone, and I now pay $25 a month with a family plan. My advice to you it READ YOUR CONTRACT, FIND A REP WHO IS HONEST, SOME TMOBIL STORES ARE FRANCHISES AND CARE ONLY ABOUT MONEY NOT YOU!

Assurance wireless Customer Service sent me.  Assurance wireless Customer Service informed me that T-Mobile is responsible for Assurance wireless phones and service not working properly. The phones get horribly hot even when not in use, I ended up with a hard sore knot on my ear and my Doctor advised me to stop using the phone.  The service drops constantly, it doesn't make much sense to call a service "Lifeline" when the service does not work when you need it.  Is the "Lifeline" service provided so T-Mobile can have a tax write-off or does T-Mobile actually care about people? If T-Mobile actually cares about people and it's not just a tax write-off then T-Mobile needs to do a better job, you could start by providing adequate phones that don't cause health concerns.
Their off shore tech support is terrible. You can't understand a damn word they're saying

Bait and switch with T-Mobile on two of the four reasons I joined two weeks ago!  Lied about reward for switching carriers and lied about my hot spot joint your network😖

Thank you for your feedback!

Are you going to fix the inconsistency of your promotional messaging?
T-Mobile over charged seniors! I called each month to get the bill changed. They did a few times, now I’m ignored and over charged each month. Seniors stay away.

I need assistance as I cannot get a resolution to my issues.

I have been a customer for 19 years and I have been requesting assistance for 8 days on a replacement iPhone - I have visited 2 Apple locations and 3 T-Mobile stores (a total of about 7 hours of my time) and been on the phone with reps for about 12 - 15 hours with no resolve. After 19 years as a client, I would expect more and feel incredibly undervalued.

For one the supervisor's need to know the difference between perception and reality for two when they extended our service last month 3 times after service was discontinued the phones on the account was immediately reinstated but yet as a customer according to the supervisor we was u under the perception of them extending our bill wait the reality is after disconnected service they immediately reinstated service how is that perception, three when we called not once not twice 8 times to keep from service interruption from happening they couldn't extend why makes no since they couldn't extend again,the reality is T-Mobile don't give a damn just like other big companies

My son returned two phone and USPS confirmed with tracking # that phone were received three months ago, phones were paid for in full and TMobile was buying them back for $600 but T- Mobile is claiming they didn't receive and increased bill by $41 a month when my son got the two phones on a promo of $16.99 for both a month. If they don't fix soon my family will be going to a new carrier if they lost phones after received that is not customers problem!
Horrible internet. Completely worthless .

edits.text: I have had T-Mobile home internet for years ( because I have no other options) I would not recommend it it is horrible. I have to reset the gateway 10 times a day. It is completely useless after 6pm . The tech support is horrible as well they don’t know anything about it.

text: The worst costumer service ever!!!!!!! It’s a nightmare to be part of this company!

In 2021 I got a few texts and emails that our two Samsung Galaxy S4s would soon no longer work due to turning off 3G and they would be upgraded for free. This turned out not to be so. By "upgraded" they only mean activating a new phone that you have to pay for! Fortunately the T-mobile store guy pointed out that S4s are 3G and 4G and 4G service was not being turned off.
But another issue is that at the same time I got a text warning that WiFi calling would cease to work after mid 2021. Indeed it did on one S4, but not on the another  - until today that is, when , while trying to troubleshoot out why it was working on one S4 and not the other, tech support said " it shouldn't be", and did something which immediately stopped it working on the second S4 and then hung up on me. They have an WiFi calling enable/disable button for each device, and they are not admitting it.
I smell a class action here waiting for somebody to file, because it is wrong for them to damage our property that we have paid for by degrading features that induced us to buy it. I will give them a chance to supply a free replacement that works before becoming a plaintiff. T-mobile has been s decent carrier until now, but now tech support is being told to obfuscate and lie about these problems.

15 Year customer of T-Mobile and today was the last straw. I have never had issues til the merger and all of a sudden, the service went to complete crap. Over the weekend there was a complete tech black out-No Tmobile internet, No Tmobile cell/data-7 hours no service and attempting to call customer service was a nightmare.  I went to the retailer store  today to get a new phone, Not new service, not change any service, a new phone. Simple purchase...Wrong...Thier card processing software, a MASSIVE tech giant, card processing glitched multiple times. Two charges was 355 dollars, each, which they said never went thru, but I signed a rec for one. A third charge was then made for 155. Which they said never went thru. At the end of the day, I had over 850.00 in charges on my card that they assured me would drop off, but because THIER system failed, it wasnt showing as anything paid, so I couldnt have the phone. Due to the fact I had missed a day of work, attempting to buy a new phone, bc I literally couldnt work without the phone. I left and went next door to ATT. I then call T-Mobile to get my account info and port key and was given the run around...FINALLY going back to the retail location and requesting the port key, I was finally given a port key for ATT. I am done and over TMobile. If you dont have TMobile, dont waste your time. Its a nightmare company since the merger and Ill never go back

TMobile is a rip off. If you want them to impose apps and $$$$ they're for you.
I can't wait to get rid of them. Stuck in unwanted Contract.

I have to let you know about the terrible service I received from T-Mobile.
First I ordered a Hot spot through the online chat. I was sold this hotspot at a discount. When I received my invoice, there was no discount. So I called to tell them they didn't give me the promised discount. They then changed my bill and applied the discount. 

A few days later I receive the wrong Hot spot. I notice it from the start and did not use the hot spot and returned it. I receive a bill for $150 for using the data on the hot spot. I called to tell them that I never used the device, but they had in their system that I used data for about 8 hours. Which is wrong, so it clearly shows that they are overcharging their client for never used data. I called and they agreed to reimburse me. 

I still receive a bill for $62 a month later. I called again to say that I don't owe any money because I returned the device and I never used the service. I was confirmed that the amount had been canceled and that the next invoice would be $0. 

The next month I receive another bill for $62, I call back and I am again confirmed that my next bill will be $0 and that I don't owe any amount. 

The month after I still receive a balance of $62 and my account has gone into collection. I called again and they made me wait 45 minutes to transfer me to a manager. And then the line disconnected. 

This is the worst phone company I have ever had to deal with in my life. 

I advise everyone never to use their service. They are thieves, scammers and liars. They charge you more by adding data that you never use and hope you don't realize.
Bad customer service kept that the same from Sprint

Haggerty rd Novi MI 
I received the worst service ever after I purchased a phone from this store 
The arrogance of the sales man was incredibly until he failed to do anything he claimed after taking money for a new phone 
His claim was "you'll be leaving with your new phone in 15 minutes with all your information on your phone THIS IS WHAT WE DO" 
After 2 1/2 hours most of what was on the phone that I arrived with was lost , family pictures , work reference pictures , notes , phone numbers .......
Liars and thieves work there 
The most ghetto phone store I have ever been in 
Steer clear of this place unless you like to be lied too and talked down to after they fail

Tried to purchase 4 iPhone 14's for the family. Impossible to complete the transaction. They tell me I qualify for up to 15 lines but somehow they are unable to sell me 4 phones and lines of service without going into store and paying $140.00 support fee (activation fee). Taking my business ($5,556 over 24 months) somewhere else!

T-mobile nightmare!!!  Don't leave your present carrier!  We left verizon to go with t-mobile - got 2 phones and internet.  Theur service is beyond terrible!  Plus we lost both internet and cell phone connections at home for 9 days!  We switched back to Verizon but t-mobile is not sending our phone numbers over so now we are in t-mobile hell zone!  Don't switch from your present carrier!

T-mobile has been having an issue with accessing the usage data for each line for some time now. When trying to access the usage it shows "Manage Data" instead of the details of the usage. I would like to know why they haven't come to a resolution after all this time. It just keeps happening over and over again to many customers going back years! T-mobile why haven't you figured this out yet?  We give you our business and pay you our hard earned money every month. We should be able to access what we need to when we need to. In addition, our service is horrible where we live. We get a lot of  "Not connected to a network" dropped calls, calls that don't go through, call that don't come through when someone says they've been trying to call us. Texts that don't go out nor come through, internet not working or extremely slow because of service connection. This is horrible service. Get it together!

I tried for months to get on our contract as an "second primary", which was supposed to have been done when we purchased the phones. They insisted he had to call and make this happen, even after I had explained multiple times that he has Dementia and is now in a nursing home. They just said there was no way they could do anything. A nurse finally helped him to call and tell them to put me on as the "priority owner", they said they did, the next thing I knew they were telling me I could do nothing with the phone (ex: changing providers, getting different phones, etc.) because I'm just an authorized user. About the only thing I'm allowed to do is pay the bill. Customer Service is a joke, I found the reps very sarcastic and even angry at times, it seems protocols come before humanity with this bunch. My next question will be, when and if my husband passes before me, how do I get rid of this terrible service.

First, when l signed for home internet service, they fraudulently used my credit card, which l had to cancel and request a new card. This was a tremendous inconvenience for me as relates to other business l had with that card.
Second, they lost the online order, and l had to repeat the entire transaction at the brick and mortar.
Third, three weeks later l began having internet problems: it took hours to get on line or was impossible to get on line for days.
Fourth, when you call in for help you would have a multihour wait, and when they took your call they would hang up without resolving the problem. Or, they would schedule a call back and never call back. Or they would outsource the call to the Philippines. When l complained l had no internet for days she offered a $10 credit but had no solution to my problem or even a timetable for an anticipated fix. 
I also did not appreciate the callous treatment l received from their rather grandiose staffers, which you would think might be a bit more humble given the total scrape the barrel bottom incompetent service they provide. Even Hughesnet was more reliable. They are the absolute worst.

I would say T-Mobile had bad customer service but it’s more like no customer service. A FULL hour on the phone for a simple change that the store clerk said I had to do on the phone  I was put on hold FOUR times even when I asked to speak to a supervisor twice.  Disgraceful  service to their customers. LEAVING AND NEVER GOING BACK.

The service for the past month has gotten worse. This company fails to adhere to their promise. 5 G service amounts to nothing but crap, which means I was lied to when I signed up for service a month ago. I am cancelling T-mobile.
Offered two free phones. Well first month was free. Not anymore. Three calls nothing. Do yourself a favor stay far away.

The first two years when it was LTE only coverage was great. Since migration to 5G the service is intermittent in my home. I either have 5 bars or NO SERVICE. T-MOBILE tech support told me they were upgrading the tower site. 
Possibly too many users now?
It always works great late night and early morning. 
Afternoons the signal disappears. 
I MADE THE MISTAKE A YEAR AGO OF GETTING T-MOBILE HOME INTERNET… it’s a DISASTER. 
I have to go back to Comcast unfortunately.

I would like to ask why T-Mobile lies to his customers when I got my phones I asked it could be 130 a month the guy in yuba City California said yes it was it turned out to be 180 so I complained in Oroville and he said it'd be $130 the following month I get my bills 147 and some change T-Mobile lies I'm really just satisfied with their service

I switched from one carrier to t mobile first I was not told the items you get have to paid monthly. Second nothing is free. But I got stuff tried to take it back store closed down. Now I'm stuck with stuff I don't want . If I don't want the stuff I have to pay for everything now
Garbage company, garbage morals. Charging me full $300 for 4 lines that you guys deactivated 2 weeks early because I said I was switching. Nice job.

Customer service horrible, extremely long wait/hold times when asking basic account questions. Service not good. 
Constant billing errors. It’s been a nightmare dealing with t mobile.

Mr. Carmelo thank you for your time and excellent service to help us, to solve our problem. Your Legend to help our frustration regarding the charges that we even doesn't know. We are so glad and very thankful that you can able to end up this ghost in our account. I can give 5 stars to this people that help us from the beggining until now Carmelo, John, Trey. They are smart people that we can assured help from customer service representative.
I would give them zero if possible!! Worst service ever

Been with T-mobile for about 4 years. We have 2 lines and our bill has always been about $250 a month. Now our bill has gone up $100. Contacted them and the only response IIANA can give is "prorated charges the posted in the middle of the month. No other explanation and proceeds to argue about what I have paid. I know what my bill has been. Now they are just tacking on extra crap just to charge you more! For $345 a month, I better never get another scam call, scam text or any of the sort. The dropped calls better STOP! AND THE DATA BETTER ALWAYS WORK!!! Crap phone service!

I was a customer of T-mobile for nearly 15 years. I finally left and went to Verizon. The customer service inside the stores are absolutely horrendous. They make promises they never keep and when you remind them of said promises they get a horrible case of amnesia. Cell service was so bad that I missed nearly every call and tried numerous times to give them chance after chance. I pay more at Verizon but since switching I have had zero issues. I will NEVER use T-mobile again. Attempting smoke signals would probably work better than their cell service

If I could give less of a star I would. Getting harassing phone calls from collection agencies that T-Mobile is sending after me because they say that I still owned them $88 from when I closed the service in Oct.2021. I pacifically asked the individual "TWICE" if I am going to be required to pay anything else afterward and BOTH TIMES he said NO. At the time their data service sucked big time. Waiting up too a minute for a web page to load. Totally unacceptable service then and continues today.

I called T-mobile six times regarding a phantom charge for $309. T-mobile customer service is a joke. They were totally useless. T-Mobile is corrupt and incompetent. For over four months I was harassed to pay $309.00 for equipment that I returned when I terminated my service. I provided a UPS tracking number for the returned equipment which listed T-Mobile’s loading dock as the location where it was received. I was then told it was received however without my knowledge a second cell spot which I never received was scheduled to be sent but was never sent to me. Even though it was never sent T-mobile still charged me for it. I was told two of the six times that it would be removed from my bill but never was. T-mobile just lost a customer for life. I would advise anyone considering becoming a T-mobile customer to reconsider and find another option.

I wish I could give these scam artists ZERO stars. IF YOU WANT TO BE STOLEN FROM ON THE MONTHLY BASIS AND THEN BE TOLD THAT THE THEFT WONT END AND YOU WONT BE COMPENSATED FOR YOUR LOSSES GO TO T MOBILE! WHERE THEY FALSELY ADVERTISE THINGS, LOCK YOU IN, OVERCHARGE YOU, AND IF YOU COMPLAIN THEY BASICALLY TELL YOU TO KISS THEIR ASS AND DO NOTHING TO FIX THE ISSUE. DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THEM. THEY LIE ABOUT THE QUALITY OF SERVICE, THEY LIE ABOUT PRICES, THEY STEAL FROM YOU BY OVERCHARGING YOU, AND THEY REFUSE TO COMPENSATE YOU FOR THEIR STICKY FINGERS! DO NOT DO NOT DO NOT USE T-MOBILE FOR A PROVIDER. YOU WILL LITERALLY BE BETTER OFF WITH NO PHONE AT ALL!!!

Being a 5g subscriber  I have been only on LTE service for 5 straight days in my area in Northern Virginia. Normally the service s satisfactory. The issue I have that  Prompts me to only give 3 stars to T-Mobile is the fact that I had to call customer service to find that they are making an upgrade to the 5G tower in my area. They never reached out to me to explain that I would be out of 5G coverage and apparently there is no time frame that I can be given on when my 5G service will be restored .  So now I am supposed to just continue paying for service that I don't know when I will be receiving? This is poor customer relations because they could have easily sent a text message to customers in this area that will be affected explaining that we will not have 5G service for a specified amount of time.
I had Sprint for over 10 years and had great customer service, but since they merged it has been a nightmare and I am switching.  I do not recommend T-mobile for anyone.

Beware of billing scams!  Upgraded 5 phones back in June and was assured they were free upgrades (had to pay activation fee but that was fine) and still don't have billing issues resolved.  I am getting over-charged for my "free" upgraded phones.  Have spent hours with customer service to fix when they have assured me all credits and issues will be fixed the next billing cycle.  That's a big lie.  They are stealing my money and time.  Upgraded phone were not worth this hassle and now looking to go back to Verizon where I never had billing issues that were not immediately resolved.  Do not get scammed like me and lose so much money and time!
A month after I canceled my account in full, they continued to charge me. Absolutely horrible service and they rob you blind. Do NOT use Sprint/T-Mobile!

edits.text: The worst customer service I've ever received! Their customer service is farmed out to an Indian call center where they barely speak English and read their instructions, rather than have any knowledge of T-Mobile/cell service whatsoever. I will never use nor refer anyone to this ridiculously trash service!

text: The sales rep did fine. I switched to T-Mobile and got everything set up. I went home and no cell signal even with the the Weboost amplifier. I called customer service and was told they were working on the tower in my area. Five days later still no cell service. All my family had other carriers and they had full bars and me, ZERO. I went to switch carriers and it took over an hour  of waiting on the phone to talk to a T-Mobile rep to get a PIN code to transfer and keep my number. They said that they couldn’t verify my account and would not give me a PIN code. Back to T-Mobile to my sales rep and he did an excellent job taking care of my problem. T-Mobile added an additional phone number to my account that I did not authorize and they said that was the primary number on the account, therefore that’s why I could get the account verification. People stay far away from T-Mobile.

The Tmobile on Beach st. employees are awesome! I purchased the phone on Saturday the ladies were very patient and helpful. On Monday I could not figure out why my camera was not working, called the store Mondo walked me thru!!!Just like that! My camera is working. These guys ROCK!!!!!

Absolutely horrible.  DO NOT SWITCH!  I tried there internet service and despite ssaying it would work at my address, it did not.  I returned the Modem 4 days later.  No Charges according to the trial agreement.  The line was cancelled. Every month I still get a bill for it and have to call to have the charges reversed.  Every month, They verify the modem was returned and the line cancelled.  They agree to reverse the changes and then the next month I get a bill again.  Each time they verify that I owe nothing, and that it is all taken care of.  None the people I spoke to speak English and all are out of country consumer serve people who are difficult to understand.  at least half the time the calls get disconnected and I have to call back, even though they have my call back number, they never call back.

Hello all 
I don’t have a good review at all. 
T-Mobile in sammamish is awful. 
Stood at the counter for over an hour. I was wanting to trade in my phone.   And he told me I was Eligible to upgrade and trade in my phone.  And right before he was gonna do the trade he says oh sorry we can’t do it because of this little tiny scratch. I was very frustrated and upset. Left another review on there site. The guy tells me to email him to settle this. He never emailed back.  I’m switching carriers. Maybe version.

And this is the worst phone company I've ever had in my life I wouldn't recommend this to my dog and I would not advise anybody else on using this company either my phone bill went from $84 and now is $422 in the matter of 10 hours T-Mobile has no consideration they don't care and they don't care about your experience or what you're going through you have to continually call them every single month to get them to adjust your bill because they're making mistakes and buyer beware do not use T-Mobile go somewhere else!!

So radiculous company, made mistakes and charge you much more money every time you made changes to the plan, they took the opportunity to rob your money. Spent several hours to call them and issue is still there. Keep away if you can.

I dealt with att Verizon  and T-Mobile 
I would not recommend anybody to sign up with T-Mobile. The most helpless telephone company.
Not able to resolve any issue’s eventually I had to move back to ATT.
Last 6 month it was pure torture 
And lost a lot of money with there inability to resolve what seems to be small problem. I’m

To The person in charge of T-Mobile, 

I am writing this letter because of my disappointment of T-Mobiles customer service and inability to solve problems.

I had my own account and decided to join my sons family plan (BIG MISTAKE). 

 My son had ordered a Pixel phone through Best Buy and about an hour after he ordered the phone he received an E-mail they cancelled the order because it was out of stock.  So being the left hand does not know what the right hand is doing my son is being charged for a phone he never received. Upon calling 611 (totally poor service) they informed him that he had to take it up with Best Buy, Best Buy in turn tells him he has to take it up with T-Mobile.  After ping ponging back and forth between Best Buy and T-Mobile we finally get a woman on the phone who we thought finally fixed the problem, she talked to Best Buy and knew that the order was cancelled by Best Buy and never sent to my son and said the phone will come off his account in a few days.Till this day no one has fixed this problem this can all be viewed in the notes on his account please reply to get account number. This was problem #1.

When I joined my sons account I wanted to trade in my Samsung S22 Ultra for the I-phone 14 Pro Max.  This turned into a total debacle. After paying my Phone off there was fraud alert with my debit card so I called T-Mobile and they told me that my order was now postponed to November 4th. So I went to Best Buy in person and got the phone from them and tried to cancel the order from T-Mobile via 611. They were unable to cancel the order because what they said was they did not know why, I received that phone 2 days later and I refused it because of their lack of knowledge that the phone was on its way I would have had two phones.  Again poor customer service. Now my son want out of T-Mobile with I can not blame him so I tried to open my own account and import my two numbers under my own name to find out I am locked into his account for 90 Days, ARE YOU KIDDING ME!

Your non English speaking customer service is a disaster, T-Mobile used to have great customer service, WHAT HAPPENED?

Any Help with this disaster would be greatly appreciated,

James Brady
Linda Myron

Switched to T-Mobile months ago.  One challenge after another.  Representatives in the store lied.  Billing is not as promised.  Coverage is poor.  Constant dropped calls.  Ongoing voicemail issues.  Stay away from this company.

Sadly a once great cell coverage is now crap.  And Website is so slow it is hardly usable. Barely works at my home.  20 years ago everything was great.  Then 5+ years ago problems, dropped calls, usable voice quality, missed calls & messages, sometimes can not call out at all.  T-mobile sent repeater boxes, nice fixed problems for a while.  Now repeater box only has 0-1 of 5 bars, most of the time (was 3-4 bars).. Appears that rollout of 5G, is killing 4G LTE coverage, and/or 5G cell upgrades have caused problems.  No solutions from T-mobile in 18 months of complaints.  Same thing happened with Verizon 20 years ago, they over sold service (too many phones for # of cells), and coverage got poor.  Switched to T-Mobile, a small company that cared.  Now T-Mobile is the 900lb monster, that does not care.  All T-Mobile effort into marketing, not customer service.   Appears T-Mobile marketing has oversold services (too many phones for network to handle).  Good service when it works, but not near my house anymore. I live in a Twin Cities MN suburb, T-mobile coverage map shows complete coverage at my home, which is not true.

I have had T-Mobile since 2011 and their customer service quality has gone down the gutter. I cancelled my service 3 months ago and have been continuing to get charged for service I already cancelled, all bc the rep I spoke with didn’t take all of the steps to properly close my account. Now, they can’t track down the internet modem I sent back to them. When you call, you can’t get ahold of someone who can actually help you with your problem or escalate it to be properly handled. They used to have the BEST customer service and I felt really taken care of. Now I feel like a general answer is all they can give and they don’t actually help with anything.

Since T-Mobile came together with Sprint I have not had service at my home. I pay 460.00 a month for 3 phones and I pay my bill on time, but I don't have the service that I pay for.  I have contacted these people over 8 times about the issue. Its ALWAYS the same thing...let me get you IEMI and SIM number and they still dont fix it. I even asked for a manager once and no one came to the phone I was on hold for over 30 minutes and no one came. No one has ever offered to take something off of my monthly bill because I did not have service!!!! I  hate SPRINT/TMOBILE since they combined. They combined together to make the WORST SERVICE EVER!!

T-Mobile store at Cherry Hill Mall in NJ. 2000 NJ-38 Space 1880, Cherry Hill, NJ 08002
Lazy a## customer service rep Natality with a nasty attitude. Sitting on top of a table, no proper greeting. Asked about iphone restocking fee, "I don't know look on the receipt". Get off your lazy a##, pull up your customer's account. Look like accurate information to give to the customer. Walked in the Apple store across, smiling and greeting. This store should be shut down.

Do NOT and I repeat, do NOT get service through TMobile.Please take these reviews seriously! T-Mobile is absolute  the worst  cell phone company I have ever dealt with in all of my life! I really want to go back to Cricket, which was way better.
The only reason I went to T-Mobile was because I wanted to get an Iphone and have service when I'm out of country, which can't happen with Cricket. 
They do not honor their discounts and have given me the run around. 
I have been dealing with the same issue that began back in June when I got the Iphone and was promised my discount by the T-Mobile sales rep that I get through my work company.
Well FIVE months later and I'm still not getting the discount I was promised! The online chat rep corrected my bill last month and said moving forward, the discount would be on my bill. But, guess what? The very next month, my bill was back higher than it should have been again.
I have spent HOURS on the phone with this horrible, awful, company!
Please, go to ANYBODY else, but do NOT USE T-MOBILE!!! You will regret it. I know I do.

TMobile is Reps for tech support are the worst.  Sales will take you that you get over 50 mbds for both Download and Upload and that is a LIE.  Do not go to T Mobile at all.  The upload is only 15.78 Mbps.  Trying to work from home and call customer does not work and the Sales Person knew this.  The tech rep did not know his BUTT from a hole in the ground.  The are rated 0

Customer service is absolutely horrible. The store representatives act like they don’t give a **** about you. They treat you like you’re nothing but an inconvenience. I’ve went to several different stores, worked with several different people, and they all just try to get me out asap and don’t offer real help if they can avoid it. They have a “that’s your problem, not mine” attitude. There is SO much friction working with them.

I have never met a company so content on lying to its customers. They tell you the tower is being upgraded and should be up and running in 3 days.  Just happened to me again! Strangely, for the number of times they've told me there was an upgrade completing in three days and "I'd get even better speeds!" I should be around 200mbps by now. I finally called them out on this and they told me to "check the internet for other possible solutions. " What do I find? They lie to customers ON PURPOSE because T mobile gives them ten minutes to get the customer off the phone! Then,  if the customer calls back in three days the agents get dinged for this too! Makes sense why they tell you the tower is being upgraded and will be up and running in 72 hours! What a disgusting company! Can't wait for other options and be able to drop this corporate garbage option.

Ordered T mobile internet. Never received the gateway. Could have just gone with optimum or Verizon but wanted to give them a try. No wonder there prices are so cheap. I never received the item. Customer service was useless and they made me to be the problem. Do not use this company. The motto is you get what you pay for well for me I never even received what I paid for. Feels like a scam. Stick to optimum or Verizon for home internet.

Worst experience ever. When I received the gateway, I was unable to connect to the internet. When I called them for help, I could barely hear the service rep because the background noise was so loud, and I also had trouble understanding him due to English not being his first language. I might have been able to understand him better had the background noise not been so loud, and he was a nice guy who was trying to help. But he couldn't help me so I gave up after being on the phone with him for half an hour. When I tried calling back to cancel, it took an hour of confusing conversations with them in which I had trouble hearing and understanding them, but they did finally let me cancel, so that is one good thing.

Customer  service sucks. 5 months and waiting for a refund for a service I canceled 2 days after!  Never installed their router.  I returned it the next day but they took my money.  Now they say, because I don’t have the password they can’t refund me!  Asked for the name of their manager and was told they had to protect his identity!!! 
Eas told to go to one of their stores for them to confirm my identity!  This is ludicrous!  I gave them the account #, name and address but they can’t identify the account???  In May I asked for my money back was told it would take 30 days.  5 months later and still waiting!   Don’t get their internet service!!!

Very difficult to work with them Treat you like you're inconveniencing them I have to get my phone fixed 3 times with service adjusted 3 times spent hours at their store every time they say I'm all set I'm not!!! Forced me into an upgrade worse than my other phone now I'm out money thank you very much
they overcharge I'm switching to Verizon I hope I get a better service there

Don’t trust T Mobile billings. I cancelled my account on Sep 19, two days before my future bill was due. Today Oct 12 I get an invoice issued on Oct 2 for another month. They claim I needed to cancel in August to avoid this….absolutely absurd.

BTW you can  not cancel online. You must call in.

I will never use them again.

author.name: Tim Early - Early Home Inspection LLC

text: 20 years of being a Verizon business customer. Came to T-Mobile with the promise of certain prices and never received one of them!Lied to from day 1 and nobody will make it right after 20 plus phone calls. I was told there is nothing they can do because of their quota they have to meet they can't look like they were wrong. Do not sign up!!!!

I switched to T-Mobile from Verizon because they couldn't explain why they kept raising my bill. I have been a customer for 5 days and it has been a nightmare. They charged me for a month of service before my phones were ported over from Verizon and the sim cards weren't yet in the phones. I spent hours talking to 'CARE' to get that fixed. A representative from their corporate office berated a store manager that was trying to help me and acted like I (a new customer of exactly 4 days) was a criminal trying to get away with something. Their 'CARE' phoneline that they require you use for anything is woefully untrained. It took talking to three different people before someone could figure out how to port my daughter's phone line in another state from Verizon to T-Mobile. I would not recommend T-Mobile to anyone.

I had purchased a remote house on a lake. As a Verizon customer I soon discovered Verizon has no service in the area.
I went to a T-Mobile  store and was assured they provided adequate service in the area.
I switched to T-Mobile and even purchased a Hot Spot for internet service.
I explained the lake house was only a part time residence and my time there would be sporadic as my schedule permitted.
After a half dozen trips over a period of 30 days or so I came to the conclusion that T-Mobile's service was not only inadequate but frustratingly sporadic.
Returned to the store and they informed me that I could  not return the Hot Spot for I had it over 15 Days.
I called T-Mobile customer service and talked to a very helpful person who looked up the lake house address on a T-Mobile service map. She said the map clearly showed that T-Mobile service in that area was non-existent in a house or car and marginal out side a structure.
The T-Mobile Store knew or should have known there was no service in the area, so I was duped into buying  equipment and committing to T-Mobile as my carrier.
Big problem in trying to undue the deception.
Moral of the story personally check a service Map before committing to any Carrier.

Phone service is about the same as everyone else. Internet has been awful. Was told I was signing up for unlimited internet.  After signing up and buying a hotspot I was told Tmobile does not have unlimited internet. Getting issues resolved has taken hours over and over again. Everyone in my area had an unexpected outage that lasted a week and a half. They couldn't tell anyone when we would have service again. Lost wages because of this. Don't get Tmobile for internet.

We used to have Sprint and lived in Spain for 2 years, no problems. Last week when in Spain, it says Orange LTE but no reception. You have to buy international plan. $25 a week. We went to Gibraltar was no service. on the plan there are 5 of us. Each is going to be charged $25 for a week. This is a scam. They promise the FCC before the merger how nice it will be and wait for a few years and then start the charging. Next move   complain to the FCC
Terrible experience!

I have been T-Mobile customer for a long time. I have ordered new Iphone14 with next day shipping. I got an email last Wednesday says that my phone will arrive before 7pm but it has never arrived. I checked the tracking number, and it shows that phone arrived at UPS facility in Jersey but not moving anymore. I called UPS, they told me that they cannot locate the phone and we have to open a claim, but they told me that they have a special agreement with T-Mobile, so T-Mobile has to open the investigation, not me.

I called T-Mobile and after 45min talking with the representative told me that he opened an investigation, and they will let me know. Since then, I haven’t heard from anyone and phone still is not moving, I called UPS and they told me that T-Mobile has never opened a claim!!!! (Even I am tired typing this experience!!!) I called back T-Mobile and representative told me that she will fix the issue, after waiting on the line 30min, she told she called UPS, and they cannot locate my phone!?! I was like I already told you this story, tell me something I don't know or how you are going to fix it. 

She told me that they shipped the phone, UPS lost it. I am sorry but I don't care who lost it, I am a customer and paying more than 1K for a phone plus contract, and I don't have the phone on my hand that I purchased from T-Mobile. its T-Mobile responsibility to deliver my phone. If T-Mobile is not happy with UPS, then don't do business with them. 

I am sick and tired with T-Mobile. I called multiple times UPS and T-Mobile, got frustrated, always on the line almost an hour, and at the end there is no solution. Only I hear “I am so sorry for the convince”, why don't you try the fix the issue instead? 

If I were you guys, I could send a new phone right away with overnight shipping instead of making me wait so long, calling UPS and T-Mobile almost daily, waiting online an hour with no solution….

I canceled my order and going to close my account with T-Mobile. Very disappointing customer service if there is one. I don't want to hear T-Mobile again. Good luck with your business.

this company does not care about loyal customers. NO English speaking reps..cannot speak to anyone about my bill...screwed all the way around . if you want a mobile phone company run from these snakes..

I have Revv4 -5G (I am a retired computer systems engineer)
Took some photos to send to my customers Plugged in USB cable from cellphone to computer and popup immediately identified  cell phone 
I am using Ubuntu and went DASH Panel on left hand side of screen to see REVV4 5G Icon .when I clicked the Icon -a folder popped up and stated it was empty.That was 96 hours ago! Took phone to local store and tech stated Store does not have capability to debug After 3 hours on phone with tech support they said I have to take cell phone go to local store  where we can have 3 way conversation.You guessed.He referred me to local store which does not have the capability

Christine G.
T Mobile 678 Centre of New England Blve Coventry RI
 October 9th, 2022
I am absolutely appalled at how they handled customer service. We worked with an Angela I believe for about 3 hours and the 1 phone I wanted wasn't out
I am absolutely appalled at how they handled customer service. We worked with an Angela I believe for about 3 hours and the 1 phone I wanted wasn't out yet an so I was going back and forth with the 3 Samsung S22's and said to her and another worker I absolutely no way would ever take the Samsung 21 FE. I decided on the regular S22 and there were other boxes from my husband's phone and cases ect. I didn't look at my phone till after dinner and found out she gave me the phone I said I absolutely didn't want. When we went back they tell me I have to pay the restocking fee even though it's her fault plus the screen protector there is nothing they can do about it I will have to buy a new one for the new phone and no credit for the phone she screwed up on. SERIOULY? Oh but they will be able to return the case how nice of them. Thanks for the great customer service on your mistake. YOU SHOULD NOT CHARGE A RESTOCKING CHARGE AND PUT THE SCREEN PROTECTER TORWARD THE CORRECT PHONE AND SAME THING WITH THE CASE! It is the proper thing to do when your employee screws up! Wish I could give negitive 10 stars. I can not believe they are not willing to help the customer with there Era. I was back right away it's not like I came back weeks later. Very poor customer service and very bad for there business.
It was very simple and easy.

Brutal customer service….went on chat to ask if there were any promotions to buy 2 new iPhones from them…told them I could only chat, no phone….they called repeatedly and would not tell me about any promotions….after 20 minutes of back and forth, they provided list price….when I asked about AT&T and Verizon promos they pretty much told me to beat it…..been a customer over 5 years….I will not be any longer.

I have been a loyal T-Mobile customer for 6 years but I guess that doesn't matter With their payment arrangements they lie to you and tell you  it could be changed By a supervisor so I called just before the bill was due could not get in touch with the supervisor the whole day day the next day they debited my accountAnd of course it bounced and I got hit with that fee so they suck don't go to them

Their service terrible I had  Sprint who was much better.  Since the switch to T Mobile ug
I don't recommend using TMobile

I am very angry and upset at tmobile, even though i am very loyal customer of tmobile for last 6 yrs, but this year I am having a terrible customer service (billing issue) with tmobile. I called more than 10 time to customer service and asked to have manager/supervisor call me back, and no response. They screwed my bill, and blame me for not reading the terms and condition of their contract. It seems like its a one way street, either you pay what they ask for or switch provider. NO ONE CARES AT TMOBILE ANYMORE !!!!!
T-mobile is awful! It loses internet constantly and you have to restart the phone. When this contract is up I will Never do business with this company again!!!

Run, stay away, OMG they said they could get me 2 hotspots, 2 Sims cards for my phone. I paid $476 to Verizon to payoff phone. I paid $228 to Tmobile to get set up. That was to include a prorated month, activation fees, everything. First bill should have been $200. Flat. Was charged $212. Then they screwed up payment day. Should have been on 21st every month. They set up 12th. Had to pay $10 for payment arrangement. Then did the same thing next month. Then my bill should have been $200. But it was $228. Plus another $127 for prorated month. My ass. I paid everything up front. So now they scratched the date change this month. My phone will be shut off on 16th. I will be w/o a phone until the 25th wherever that date came from. I'm a paraplegic vet. I live by myself, if I fall and get hurt I have no way of calling. What the hell am I supposed to do. They will not work with me, they say none of this is their fault. In reality if they told me this in the beginning I would have stayed with Verizon until the bill pay date starts. Plus for the first month I didn't even have wifi because tower was down. Now it's up I can only get 3 bars on Hotspot and none on phone. I live in Andrews, TX. You won't stay in business long lying to people like this or screwing them over. My advice to everyone, run, stay away from TMobile. They are only out for money and will screw you over every chance and every way they get. Don't let the BS about we care for veterans fool you either. It's all a marketing scheme. You'll pay for it in the end. They'll wreck your credit too, that's coming because they want to charge me over $800 to cancel my services with them. Even if I turn everything back in.
50 miles of dead zone in Wisconsin, can you hear me now, that all I say cent I got t-mobile...

If I could give zero stars I would. Decided to switch from verizon to t-moble. The representative  activate a new phone for me and at the end told me he was unable to transfer my number that I had for over 20 years. Call customer service gave them my account pin ro transfer my number was told it would only take 2 hour. Call back 2 hours later and was told it will take 2 hours more. Then call back again told it will take 24 hour. This is very frustrating.  I don't mine the wait but all the missed information is irritating.

Boy they sure took my money from my bank account when they shouldn't have,but yet it will take over a month to get it back to me. Ought to be ashamed of themselves for what they try to do for people. I hope I get this back soon or my lawyer will be talking to them next

I have spent a total of about 15 hours on the phone with this Companies (lack) of Customer Service over the past 4 days.  Again and again I explain the problem verify my Business Name and information only to have them send me to the residential support team, and start all over!  Even after you explain that you have tried all of the basic trouble shooting steps they want you to do again and again, they just ignore you and move on.  To the point they hung up on me at least three times.  When I did get to upper level tech support they could not fix the issue and just wanted to blame the device.  A brand new iPhone 14 Pro.  For the past 2 - 3 weeks I have not been able to keep a call more than about 1.5 to 3 minutes with out dropping the call.  It happened MULTIPLE times  when talking to support, yet there is NO problem!  terrible Company, no support and employees are not trained well to handle the # of customers they have.  They may cost less, but you will be lucky to get your service to work.  STAY AWAY AT ALL COSTS!  Back to Verizon, may cost more but damn, it works!
